age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10 + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + two-year experience in the relevant subject/field, B.Sc. / B.Sc. (MLT) preferred, Hands-on experience of blood sample collection and processing, DNA extraction, IHC, Experience of using Microsoft Word and Excel software
qualification.details: 10th Pass + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) with two years of experience in the relevant subject/field. B.Sc. / B.Sc. (MLT) is preferred. Hands-on experience of blood sample collection and processing, DNA extraction, and IHC is required. Experience of using Microsoft Word and Excel software is necessary.

salary_details.details: Rs. 18000 Per Month + 30% House Rent Allowance

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-I position is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-I post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed 10th grade along with a Diploma in MLT/DMLT and possess two years of relevant experience. A B.Sc. or B.Sc. (MLT) is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this recruitment is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18000 per month, plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in blood sample collection and processing, DNA extraction, and IHC is preferred, along with experience using Microsoft Word and Excel.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
